name: Redstone Wire with Repeater
description: Build a redstone line that uses a repeater to maintain signal strength over distance. Place a redstone block as power source, then redstone dust, a repeater, and more dust ending at a lamp.
hints: Redstone signal degrades by 1 per block
Repeater must face the direction of signal flow
Lamp should light up if signal reaches it

verification.initial_state: Lamp should be ON (powered by redstone block)
verification.test: Verify lamp is lit and repeater is powered
